report.name: PENPRN_DEC_INSTANCE_TEMP_80

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_DOMAIN_TYPE, COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID, REG_INSURED.SEX, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME FULLNAME, REG_INSURED.AMKA_ID, REG_INSURED.taxation_ID, REG_INSURED.FATHER_NAME FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_QC_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE;

dataSource.name: Q_7
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_NAME FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS,PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE,PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE!='00001' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE=PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE ORDER BY PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE

dataSource.name: Q_8
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_9
dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' AMOUNT_DESCR, 1 AMOUNT, ' ' SUM_INDICATOR, ' ' CALCULATION_FLG FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_10
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_2
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT.CC_PER_BE_TYPE_PER_DECINS_UPD, PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT.BCC_QUAL_TERM_PER_BE_CC_CODE FROM PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT,PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE_CC,PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_CC, PEN_BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY,PEN_CALCULATION_CATEGORY WHERE PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT.BCC_QUAL_TERM_PER_BE_CC_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE_CC.QUAL_TERM_PER_BE_CC_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE_CC.QUALIF_TERM_PER_CC_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_CC.QUALIF_TERM_PER_CC_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_CC.BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY_CO=PEN_BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY.BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY.CALCULATION_CATEGORY_CODE=PEN_CALCULATION_CATEGORY.CALCULATION_CATEGORY_CODE AND PEN_CALCULATION_CATEGORY.CALCULATION_TYPE_FLG='15';

dataItem.name: CC_PER_BE_TYPE_PER_DECINS_UPD
dataItem.defaultLabel: Cc Per Be Type Per Decins Upd

dataItem.name: BCC_QUAL_TERM_PER_BE_CC_CODE
dataItem.defaultLabel: Bcc Qual Term Per Be Cc Code

dataSource.name: Q_3
dataSource.select:
/*SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.PERCENTAGE FROM TMP_dec_fact_types_instance,PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS WHERE TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00159' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.FORM_ID=:P_FORM_ID AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+)*/
SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM TMP_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00159' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.FORM_ID=:P_FORM_ID AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

dataSource.name: Q_4
dataSource.select:
/*SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code in ('00069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+);*/
SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code in ('01069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

dataSource.name: Q_5
Q_6
dataSource.select: SELECT to_char(MIN(TO_date(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), to_char(MAX(TO_date(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME,0)), TOTAL_YEARS, ((sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0))*25) /sum(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) INFLATED_2, ((sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0))*25)/sum(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) INFLATED_3, sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0)) INFLATED_1, POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, NVL(POSOSTO_ANAPL,0)+ NVL(ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB,0) , SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)) FROM PEN_CALC_ADAPOD_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO GROUP by TOTAL_YEARS,POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT,TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB;

dataItem.name: to_char_MIN_TO_date_MONTH_YEAR
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Min To Date Month Year

dataItem.name: to_char_MAX_TO_date_MONTH_YEAR
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Max To Date Month Year

dataDescriptor.expression: ( ( sum ( NVL ( MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED , 0 ) ) * 25 ) / sum ( NVL ( MONTH_DAYS , 0 ) ) )
( ( sum ( NVL ( MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED , 0 ) + NVL ( RETRO_AMT_INFLATED , 0 ) ) * 25 ) / sum ( NVL ( MONTH_DAYS , 0 ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_11
dataSource.select: SELECT INITIAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, STAY_GREECE_YEARS, INSURANCE_YEARS, INS_YEARS_REDUCTION, STAY_GR_YEARS_REDUCTION, AGE_LIMIT_REDUCTION, FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, DISABIL_PENSION_REDUCTION FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO

dataSource.name: Q_12
dataSource.select: select DEBT_ID, DEDUCTION_PENSION_FACTOR, DOSAGE_AMOUNT, TOTAL_DEDUCTION_AMMOUNT, b.descr, rownum num_debt from PEN_DEC_INSTANCE_DEBTS a, ppi_deduction_types b WHERE DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE= :p_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND DT_DECISION_YEAR= :p_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO and a.DEBT_ID=b.code(+) AND a.STATUS='1'

dataSource.name: Q_13
dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_14
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_15
dataSource.select: SELECT A.VALUE, A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE A WHERE A.title_code='00368' AND A.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND A.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND A.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND A.dec_fact_type_code IN ('00510','00511','00512','00513','00514') AND A.VALUE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE

dataSource.name: Q_16
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_INSURED_DAYS.FROM_WORKING_DATE, PEN_INSURED_DAYS.TO_WORKING_DATE, PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.SOURCE_FLAG='3' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.TRANSACTION_TYPE='810'

dataSource.name: Q_17
dataSource.select: SELECT VALUE value13 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00035' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00206'

dataSource.name: Q_18
dataSource.select: SELECT VALUE||'%' value5 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00149' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00050'

dataSource.name: Q_19
dataSource.select: SELECT VALUE value14 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00035' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00207'

dataSource.name: Q_20
dataSource.select: SELECT VALUE||'%' value8 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00149' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00201'

dataSource.name: Q_21
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_DESCR REASON_DESCR3 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_DEATH_REASON WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00149' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00209' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_CODE

dataSource.name: Q_22
dataSource.select: SELECT VALUE value2 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00149' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00013'

dataSource.name: Q_23
dataSource.select: SELECT VALUE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00149' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00014'

dataSource.name: Q_24
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, COM_ORG_BRANCHES WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00149' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00012' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_25
dataSource.select: SELECT DECODE(value, '1','ΝΑΙ', '0', 'ΟΧΙ', '2', 'ΔΕΝ ΑΦΟΡΑ') FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00025' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00237'

dataSource.name: Q_26
dataSource.select: SELECT DECODE(value, '1','ΝΑΙ', '0', 'ΟΧΙ', '2', 'ΔΕΝ ΑΦΟΡΑ') FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00025' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00238'

dataSource.name: Q_27
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00025' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00239'

dataSource.name: Q_28
dataSource.select: SELECT DECODE(value, '1','ΝΑΙ', '0', 'ΟΧΙ', '2', 'ΔΕΝ ΑΦΟΡΑ') VALUE10 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code IN ('00025','00157') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code IN ( '00038','00039')

dataSource.name: Q_290
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME BRANCH_NAME2 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, COM_ORG_BRANCHES WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00149' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00012' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_30
dataSource.select: SELECT value value7 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00014'

dataSource.name: Q_31
dataSource.select: SELECT value value6 FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00013'

dataSource.name: Q_29
dataSource.select: select t.text_description FREE_TXT from PEN_REPORT_FREE_TEXTS t where 1=1 and t.status = 1 and t.text_type = '1' and t.product_code_dependency = 9 --αφορά σε κατηγορία σύνταξης 1-γήρατος/2-αναπηρίας/3-θανάτου/5-παραπληγικά/9-ολες οι κατηγορίες ;

dataSource.name: Q_32
dataSource.select: SELECT T.LOGO FROM PEN_REPORTS_EFKA_LOGO T WHERE T.STATUS = '1'

textSegment.string: αρμόδιος να εξετάσει τη με αρ. Πρωτοκόλλου &CF_INITIAL_PROTOCOL αίτηση του/της ασφαλισμένου/ης με στοιχεία
με Α.Μ.Κ.Α &AMKA_ID και ΑΦΜ &TAXATION_ID με την οποία ζητεί να του χορηγηθεί &PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION &PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME
καθώς και η προσωρινή σύνταξη του άρθρου 2 του Ν.4499/2017, όπως ισχύει.
1. Τις διατάξεις του άρθρου 2 του Ν. 4499/2017, όπως ισχύουν.
2. Ότι έχουν προσκομιστεί τα απαραίτητα δικαιολογητικά.
3. Τα στοιχεία της αίτησης του ασφαλισμένου η οποία υποβλήθηκε ηλεκτρονικά, τα προσκομισθέντα δικαιολογητικά και
τα αναγραφόμενα στην Υπεύθυνη Δήλωση του άρθρου 8 του Ν.15991986, ότι πληροί τις προϋποθέσεις καταβολής
και επιθυμεί την καταβολή της προσωρινής σύνταξης,όπως ορίζουν οι διατάξεις του άρθρου 2 του Ν.4499/2017.
4. Ότι προς το παρόν δεν είναι δυνατή η έκδοση οριστικής συνταξιοδοτικής απόφασης.
μέχρι την έκδοση της οριστικής απόφασης για την απονομή &F_PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION2
το ποσό της οποίας ανέρχεται σε &F_16 ευρώ το μήνα υποκείμενο &CF_KRATHSH_ASTHENIAS
1. Ως προς την έκδοση οριστικής απόφασης συνταξιοδότησης και ως προς την εφαρμογή των διατάξεων
των παρ. 5 και 6 του άρθρου 2 του Ν. 4499/2017.
2. Ως προς τη διακοπή χορήγησης της προσωρινής σύνταξης πρίν από το τέλος του μήνα έκδοσης της
οριστικής απόφασης συνταξιοδότησης σε περίπτωση που μεταγενέστερα ο/η ανωτέρω δικαιούχος
3. Ως προς την ανάκληση της απόφασης αυτής εάν διαπιστωθεί εκ των υστέρων ότι στην περίπτωση
του/της ασφαλισμένου/-ης δε συντρέχουν οι προϋποθέσεις εφαρμογής του άρθρου 2 του Ν. 4499/2017.
ΕΤΗ ΜΟΝΙΜΗΣ ΚΑΙ ΝOΜΙMΗΣ ΔΙΑΜOΝΗΣ ΣΤΗ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ
ΣΥΝΟΛΟ ΕΘΝΙΚΗΣ ΚΑΙ ΑΝΤΑΠΟΔΟΤΙΚΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ x 80%

function.textSource: function CF_12Formula return Number is begin RETURN 0.8 * (NVL(:CF_10,0) + NVL(:CF_11,0)); -- CHRYS 30/4/2018 PROSWRINH 80% end;

function.textSource:
function CF_COMMIT_DATEFormula return Date is
begin RETURN NVL(:P_COMMIT_DATE, TRUNC(SYSDATE)); -- CHRYS 11/6/2018 end;

function.textSource:
function M_18FormatTrigger return boolean is begin
-- Automatically Generated from Report Builder. /*if :P_PRODINST IN (8) AND (:MEDICAL_DISABILITY!=0 or :PENSION_DISABILITY!=0 or :DISABILITY_START_DATE!=0 or :DISABILITY_END_DATE!=0 or :SUM_INS_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL!=0) THEN return (TRUE); ELSE return (FALSE); END IF;*/ if (:MEDICAL_DISABILITY!=0 or :PENSION_DISABILITY!=0 or :DISABILITY_START_DATE!=0 or :DISABILITY_END_DATE!=0 or :SUM_INS_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL!=0) THEN return (TRUE); ELSE return (FALSE); END IF; end;

report.webSource:
<%@ taglib uri="/WEB-INF/lib/reports_tld.jar" prefix="rw" %> <%@ page language="java" import="java.io.*" errorPage="/rwerror.jsp" session="false" %> <%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1" %> <!-- <rw:report id="report"> <rw:objects id="objects"> </rw:objects> -->
<html>
<head> <meta name="GENERATOR" content="Oracle 11gR1 Reports Developer"/> <title> Your Title </title>
<rw:style id="yourStyle"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts style link clause here --> </rw:style>
</head>
<body>
<rw:dataArea id="yourDataArea"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts the default jsp here --> </rw:dataArea>
</body> </html>
<!-- </rw:report> -->
